title: achillea setacea subsp. asiatica
intro: Achillea setacea subsp. asiatica, also known as Asian yarrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Asian yarrow include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to support wound healing and reduce inflammation. Asian yarrow is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its herbal remedies, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
